Shared intelligence

UNIDRAW

Think, draw, and generate in one shared space. Experience an infinite collaborative whiteboard enhanced with native, visceral AI art generation.

Architecture

From grid wireframe to realistic render.

Concept Art

Rough sketch to cinematic environment.

Abstract Forms

Collaborative aesthetic exploration.

UI Wireframes

Character

Multiplayer ideation & refinement.

3D Assets

Prompting geometry directly on canvas.

The Colab Engine

Not just an AI prompt box. A fully featured workspace where human intent meets machine intelligence.

1. Live Multiplayer

Invite unlimited collaborators to your canvas. See cursors move, sketches evolve, and AI generations appear instantly for everyone in the session.

2. Flexible Environments

Switch seamlessly between an infinite blank canvas for freeform ideation, or a strict grid layout for UI mockups and precise architectural concepts.
